text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My name? Gold City. ...Do you need anything
else from me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I may be a model, but I've come to this
academy to run. And I want to use these legs to
show the world... my own kind of running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'll send you packing if you treat me like
I'm just some pretty face. Don't forget that,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
